rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in valid component type scopes and avoid implementation-level bindings in type annexes
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions to prevent type resolution errors
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions maintain type consistency and avoid introducing undefined identifiers
Generate AGREE clauses that reference only available model units and imports
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only paths
Avoid encoding AADL property associations as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component type or implementation scopes
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax with proper type declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the analyzed model's configured dependencies
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about missing packages or property sets
Component implementation scope details not relevant to type contract rules
